narrative:
Noble Township has 1,419 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
